Matched
0 I 3
1 I 4
2 I 5
3 I 6
4 I 7
5 AND 01
6 AND 12
7 AND 23

Applying to 01010001
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 1
Output
0 I 3 = 1
1 I 4 = 0
2 I 5 = 0
3 I 6 = 0
4 I 7 = 1
5 AND 01 = AND(I 0,I 1) = AND(0,1) = 0
6 AND 12 = AND(I 1,I 2) = AND(1,0) = 0
7 AND 23 = AND(I 2,I 3) = AND(0,1) = 0

\boxed{10001000}
